Content_to_be_Reported: Indicates whether report is new or a cancellation
Allowed_Values: NEWT (New) = <New> element; CANC (Cancellation) = <Cxl> element
Conditionality_Notes: Always required for all reports; fields 2/4/6 only on CANC
Key_Validation_Rules: Implemented as XML element structure - no coded field value emitted in a separate element; NEWT uses <New> child; CANC uses <Cxl> child

Content_to_be_Reported: Unique identifier per executing firm per report. For trading venue submissions on behalf of non-MiFID firms the TV generates this internally.
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory for all new and cancellation reports
Key_Validation_Rules: Max 52 chars; capital Latin letters and numbers only; must be unique per executing entity - same TRN cannot be re-used unless prior report was cancelled
Key_Error_Codes: CON-023 (duplicate TRN); CON-024 (cancellation TRN not found); CON-025 (already cancelled)

Content_to_be_Reported: Number generated by UK/Union trading venues and disseminated to both buying and selling parties per Article 12 RTS 24. Required for market side of venue-executed trades only.
Conditionality_Notes: Populated only for market side of UK/Union trading venue transactions; MUST NOT be populated where Field 36 is XXXX / XOFF / non-UK-EU venue MIC / SI MIC
Key_Validation_Rules: Max 52 chars capital alphanumeric; must not be populated for off-venue or SI transactions

Content_to_be_Reported: LEI of the entity executing the transaction.
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory for all new and cancellation reports
Key_Validation_Rules: Where Field 5 = true: LEI status must be Issued/Pending transfer/Pending archival; where Field 5 = false: Lapsed also permitted; InitialRegistrationDate <= trading date; EntityStatus Active or if Inactive LastUpdateDate >= trading date
Key_Error_Codes: CON-040 (LEI not valid - Field 5 true); CON-041 (LEI not valid - Field 5 false)

Content_to_be_Reported: Indicates whether entity in Field 4 is a MiFID investment firm.
Allowed_Values: true (yes - is MiFID investment firm); false (no)
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory for all new reports; not present on cancellation reports
Key_Validation_Rules: Only true or false permitted

Content_to_be_Reported: LEI of entity submitting report. Direct submission = executing firm LEI; via trading venue = TV operator LEI; via ARM = ARM LEI.
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory for all new and cancellation reports
Key_Validation_Rules: LEI status must be Issued/Lapsed/Pending transfer/Pending archival; InitialRegistrationDate <= submission date; EntityStatus Active or if Inactive LastUpdateDate >= submission date

Content_to_be_Reported: Identifies the acquirer of the financial instrument. Repeatable for joint accounts. LEI for legal entities; national ID for natural persons; CCP LEI if identity undisclosed on CCP venue; venue MIC if identity undisclosed on non-CCP venue; INTC for internal aggregate client account. In case of options/swaptions buyer = right holder; futures/forwards buyer = long; IR swaps buyer = fixed rate payer; FX swaps buyer = counterparty receiving alphabetically first ISO 4217 currency; CDS buyer = protection buyer.
Allowed_Values: LEI: [A-Z0-9]{18}[0-9]{2}; MIC: [A-Z0-9]{4}; NATIONAL_ID (NIDN/CCPT/CONCAT); INTC
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory for all new reports; repeatable for joint accounts
Key_Validation_Rules: LEI: GLEIF validity (status/InitialRegistrationDate/EntityStatus); MIC: valid active ISO 10383 excluding XXXX/XOFF; CONCAT: exactly 20 chars CC+YYYYMMDD+1letter+4chars(letter/#)+gender+4chars(letter/#); DOB in CONCAT must match Field 11
Key_Error_Codes: CON-070 (LEI invalid); CON-071 (country code invalid); CON-072 (MIC invalid); CON-073 (CONCAT DOB mismatch); CON-074 (format incorrect)

Field_Name: Country of Branch for the Buyer
Content_to_be_Reported: Country of branch that received client order or made investment decision under a discretionary mandate. Use head/registered office country if not a branch.
Conditionality_Notes: Applicable only where buyer is a client; not populated where buyer is a firm (other than INTC); populate under transmitted order conditions per Article 4
Key_Validation_Rules: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code valid at trading date

Content_to_be_Reported: Full first name(s) of buyer. Multiple names separated by comma.
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory where national identifier used in Field 7; not populated otherwise
Key_Validation_Rules: Allowed characters: capital Latin (A-Z) / Cyrillic (A-Ya) / Greek (Alpha-Omega) / diacriticals; non-alphanumeric: comma / space / apostrophe / minus / dash. NOTE: character set NOT enforced by XSD - must be validated at application layer.

Content_to_be_Reported: Full surname(s) of buyer. Multiple surnames separated by comma.
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory where national identifier used in Field 7; not populated otherwise
Key_Validation_Rules: Same allowed character set as Field 9; character set not enforced by XSD

Content_to_be_Reported: Date of birth of buyer.
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory where national identifier used in Field 7; not populated otherwise
Key_Validation_Rules: Must be a valid ISO 8601 date; MUST match the date of birth embedded in CONCAT code if CONCAT used in Field 7

Content_to_be_Reported: Person or firm making the acquisition decision under a power of representation. LEI for legal entities; national ID for natural persons.
Allowed_Values: LEI: [A-Z0-9]{18}[0-9]{2}; NATIONAL_ID (NIDN/CCPT/CONCAT)
Conditionality_Notes: Only populated where decision maker acts under power of representation; not populated where buyer makes their own decision
Key_Validation_Rules: Same LEI validity rules as Field 7; CONCAT DOB must match Field 15
Key_Error_Codes: CON-120 (LEI invalid); CON-121 (country code invalid); CON-122 (CONCAT DOB mismatch); CON-123 (format incorrect)

Content_to_be_Reported: Full first name(s) of buyer decision maker. Multiple names separated by comma.
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory where national ID used in Field 12; not populated otherwise
Key_Validation_Rules: Same character set rules as Field 9

Content_to_be_Reported: Full surname(s) of buyer decision maker. Multiple surnames separated by comma.
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory where national ID used in Field 12; not populated otherwise
Key_Validation_Rules: Same character set rules as Field 9

Field_Name: Buy Decision Maker Date of Birth
Content_to_be_Reported: Date of birth of buyer decision maker.
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory where national ID used in Field 12; not populated otherwise
Key_Validation_Rules: Must match DOB embedded in CONCAT code if CONCAT used

Content_to_be_Reported: Identifies the disposer of the financial instrument. Repeatable for joint accounts. Same identifier logic as Field 7. Buyer/seller role definitions mirror Field 7 (see conditionality column).
Allowed_Values: LEI: [A-Z0-9]{18}[0-9]{2}; MIC: [A-Z0-9]{4}; NATIONAL_ID (NIDN/CCPT/CONCAT); INTC
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory for all new reports; repeatable for joint accounts
Key_Validation_Rules: Same GLEIF LEI / ISO 10383 MIC / CONCAT validation rules as Field 7; CONCAT DOB must match Field 20
Key_Error_Codes: CON-160 (LEI invalid); CON-161 (country code invalid); CON-162 (MIC invalid); CON-163 (CONCAT DOB mismatch); CON-164 (format incorrect)

Field_Name: Country of Branch for the Seller
Content_to_be_Reported: Country of branch that received client order or made investment decision under discretionary mandate. Use head/registered office country if not a branch.
Conditionality_Notes: Applicable only where seller is a client; populate under transmitted order conditions per Article 4
Key_Validation_Rules: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 valid at trading date

Content_to_be_Reported: Full first name(s) of seller. Multiple names separated by comma.
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory where national ID used in Field 16; not populated otherwise
Key_Validation_Rules: Same character set rules as Field 9

Content_to_be_Reported: Full surname(s) of seller. Multiple surnames separated by comma.
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory where national ID used in Field 16; not populated otherwise
Key_Validation_Rules: Same character set rules as Field 9

Content_to_be_Reported: Date of birth of seller.
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory where national ID used in Field 16; not populated otherwise
Key_Validation_Rules: Must match DOB embedded in CONCAT code if CONCAT used

Content_to_be_Reported: Person or firm making the sell decision under power of representation. LEI for legal entities; national ID for natural persons.
Allowed_Values: LEI: [A-Z0-9]{18}[0-9]{2}; NATIONAL_ID (NIDN/CCPT/CONCAT)
Conditionality_Notes: Only populated where decision maker acts under power of representation
Key_Validation_Rules: Same LEI/CONCAT rules as Field 12; CONCAT DOB must match Field 24
Key_Error_Codes: CON-210 (LEI invalid); CON-211 (country code invalid); CON-212 (CONCAT DOB mismatch); CON-213 (format incorrect)

Content_to_be_Reported: Full first name(s) of seller decision maker. Multiple names separated by comma.
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory where national ID used in Field 21; not populated otherwise
Key_Validation_Rules: Same character set rules as Field 9

Content_to_be_Reported: Full surname(s) of seller decision maker. Multiple surnames separated by comma.
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory where national ID used in Field 21; not populated otherwise
Key_Validation_Rules: Same character set rules as Field 9

Field_Name: Sell Decision Maker Date of Birth
Content_to_be_Reported: Date of birth of seller decision maker.
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory where national ID used in Field 21; not populated otherwise
Key_Validation_Rules: Must match DOB embedded in CONCAT code if CONCAT used

Content_to_be_Reported: Indicates whether the transaction results from an order transmitted to a third party when the conditions for transmission are not satisfied.
Allowed_Values: true (order was transmitted); false (conditions for transmission not satisfied)
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory for all new reports
Key_Validation_Rules: Only true or false permitted

Content_to_be_Reported: LEI of the buy-side firm that transmitted the order to the reporting firm.
Conditionality_Notes: Only required when reporting firm is reporting on behalf of an order-transmitting firm (buy side)
Key_Validation_Rules: Same LEI validity rules as Field 4

Content_to_be_Reported: LEI of the sell-side firm that transmitted the order to the reporting firm.
Conditionality_Notes: Only required when reporting firm is reporting on behalf of an order-transmitting firm (sell side)
Key_Validation_Rules: Same LEI validity rules as Field 4

Content_to_be_Reported: Date and time when the transaction was executed. Must be expressed in UTC.
Format_Pattern: {ISO 8601 UTC datetime ending in Z}: e.g. 2024-01-15T14:30:00.000Z
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory for all new reports
Key_Validation_Rules: Must end in Z (UTC normalised datetime); sub-second precision is permitted; any non-UTC timezone offset will fail schema validation

Content_to_be_Reported: Indicates whether the firm acted as matched principal / dealing on own account / agent.
Allowed_Values: MTCH (Matched Principal - Art.4(38) MiFID II); DEAL (Dealing on Own Account - Art.4(6) MiFID II); AOTC (Any Other Capacity including agent)
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory for all new reports
Key_Validation_Rules: Exactly one of the three permitted values

Content_to_be_Reported: Number of units of the financial instrument; or nominal value; or monetary value; or number of derivative contracts.
Format_Pattern: Positive decimal (choice of Units / Nominal Value / Monetary Value)
Allowed_Values: Unit: positive decimal >0 max 18 digits / 17 fractional; NmnlVal: positive decimal >0 max 18 digits / 5 fractional + ISO 4217 Ccy attribute; MntryVal: positive decimal >0 max 18 digits / 5 fractional + ISO 4217 Ccy attribute
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory for all new reports; exactly one of Unit/NominalValue/MonetaryValue must be selected
Key_Validation_Rules: Value must be strictly greater than zero; for NmnlVal and MntryVal the currency attribute is required; use NmnlVal for debt instruments; use MntryVal for certain fund units

Content_to_be_Reported: Currency of the quantity where expressed as nominal value or monetary value. Not applicable where quantity expressed in units.
Conditionality_Notes: Required when Field 30 quantity expressed as nominal or monetary value; not applicable where quantity is in units
Key_Validation_Rules: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code; embedded as an attribute on the quantity element

Content_to_be_Reported: For derivative contracts: indicates whether the notional has increased or decreased.
Allowed_Values: DECR (Decrease to notional); INCR (Increase to notional)
Conditionality_Notes: Applicable only to derivative contracts where notional changes; not populated for non-derivatives

Content_to_be_Reported: Traded price excluding commission and accrued interest. For options: premium per underlying. For spread bets: reference price of underlying. For CDS: coupon in basis points. Use PNDG where price not yet available. Leave blank where not applicable.
Format_Pattern: Monetary / Percentage / Yield / Basis Points / PNDG (mutually exclusive choice)
Allowed_Values: MntryVal: amount >=0 max 18 digits / 13 fractional + ISO 4217 Ccy attribute + optional Sign boolean (true=negative; absent=positive); Pctg: percentage max 11 digits / 10 fractional; Yld: yield as % max 11 digits / 10 fractional; BsisPts: decimal max 18 digits / 17 fractional; PNDG: literal string pending
XSD_Element_Path: New/Tx/Pric (choice: Pric/MntryVal or Pric/Pctg or Pric/Yld or Pric/BsisPts or NoPric/Pdg)
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory for all new reports; PNDG where price not yet available; omit element entirely where price not applicable
Key_Validation_Rules: Exactly one price type must be used; monetary amount sign: absent = positive / true = negative

Content_to_be_Reported: Currency of the price where expressed in monetary terms.
Conditionality_Notes: Required when Field 33 price expressed in monetary terms
Key_Validation_Rules: ISO 4217 active currency code; embedded as attribute on the amount element

Content_to_be_Reported: Cash amount paid by the buyer of a debt instrument upon settlement.
Conditionality_Notes: Optional; applicable primarily to debt instruments
Key_Validation_Rules: No explicit currency code element - currency implied by context; decimal separator is dot; zero treated as positive

Content_to_be_Reported: ISO 10383 MIC identifying where the transaction was executed. Use XOFF where instrument is in-scope but transaction is off-venue. Use XXXX where instrument is not admitted to trading but underlying is.
Allowed_Values: Any valid ISO 10383 segment MIC (use operating MIC where segment does not exist); XOFF (admitted instrument - transaction not on MiFID venue/SI/non-EU platform); XXXX (instrument not admitted to trading but underlying is listed)
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory for all new reports
Key_Validation_Rules: Use segment MIC where available; XOFF: for admitted instruments traded away from regulated venues; XXXX: pure OTC where only underlying is admitted

Content_to_be_Reported: Country of the branch of the investment firm whose market membership was used to execute the transaction.
Conditionality_Notes: Optional
Key_Validation_Rules: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 valid at trading date

Content_to_be_Reported: Monetary value of any up-front payment in basis points of notional received or paid by the seller. Positive = seller receives; negative = seller pays. For notional change transactions express as absolute positive value.
Format_Pattern: Non-negative decimal + ISO 4217 currency + optional sign
Conditionality_Notes: Optional; applicable to derivatives (e.g. CDS); for notional increase/decrease express absolute value as positive
Key_Validation_Rules: Amount: decimal >=0 max 18 digits / 5 fractional; sign: boolean true = negative; absent = positive

Content_to_be_Reported: Currency of the up-front payment.
Conditionality_Notes: Required when Field 38 is populated
Key_Validation_Rules: ISO 4217 currency code; embedded as attribute on the amount element

Content_to_be_Reported: Internal identifier assigned by the reporting party to link all transaction reports for the same execution of a combination of financial instruments. Must be unique per reporting party for the execution group.
Conditionality_Notes: Applicable only when instrument is a combination/complex trade; not populated for simple instruments
Key_Validation_Rules: Max 35 capital alphanumeric characters; must be unique per reporting firm for the execution group

Content_to_be_Reported: ISIN of the financial instrument where admitted to trading or traded on a trading venue. Where no ISIN exists (non-admitted OTC instrument) populate Fields 42-55 instead.
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory where instrument has ISIN; use direct Id element path; where no ISIN use Othr block and complete Fields 42-55
Key_Validation_Rules: ISO 6166: 2-char country prefix + 9 alphanumeric + 1 numeric check digit

Content_to_be_Reported: Full name or description of the financial instrument where no ISIN exists.
Conditionality_Notes: Required for non-admitted instruments (Othr block); not populated where ISIN used via direct Id path
Key_Validation_Rules: Max 350 characters; capital letters/numbers and % ? # space + / characters permitted

Content_to_be_Reported: Six-character ISO 10962 Classification of Financial Instrument code identifying the type of instrument.
Conditionality_Notes: Required for non-admitted instruments (Othr block)
Key_Validation_Rules: Six uppercase letters per ISO 10962 CFI standard

Content_to_be_Reported: For interest rate derivatives: notional currency of Leg 1. For FX derivatives/cross-currency swaps: Currency 1 of the pair (alphabetically first). For swaptions: notional currency of the underlying swap leg 1.
Conditionality_Notes: Required for interest rate derivatives / FX derivatives / swaptions; populated within the Othr instrument description block
Key_Validation_Rules: ISO 4217 currency code

Content_to_be_Reported: Original maturity date of the debt instrument.
Conditionality_Notes: Applicable to debt instruments with a defined maturity only; not applicable to perpetual or open-ended instruments
Key_Validation_Rules: ISO 8601 date format

Content_to_be_Reported: Original expiry date of the derivative instrument.
Conditionality_Notes: Applicable to derivatives with a defined expiry date; not applicable to open-ended derivatives
Key_Validation_Rules: ISO 8601 date format

Content_to_be_Reported: Number of units of the underlying instrument represented by a single derivative contract. For index futures/options: the amount per index point.
Format_Pattern: Positive decimal (>0; max 18 total digits / 17 fractional)
Conditionality_Notes: Required for derivative instruments
Key_Validation_Rules: Must be strictly greater than zero; max 18 total digits with 17 fractional digits

Content_to_be_Reported: ISIN of the direct underlying; LEI where underlying refers to an issuer; index name where underlying is an index (with optional ISIN if index has one); basket of constituent ISINs/indices; swap legs. For CDS: ISIN of reference obligation.
Format_Pattern: ISIN / LEI / Index / Basket / Swap legs
Allowed_Values: Single ISIN [A-Z]{2}[A-Z0-9]{9}[0-9]; Index (optional ISIN + reference rate code e.g. EURI/LIBO + optional term); Basket (multiple ISINs and/or indices); Swap (SwpIn and SwpOut legs); LEI [A-Z0-9]{18}[0-9]{2} for issuer
Conditionality_Notes: Required for derivative instruments; type of underlying varies by instrument
Key_Validation_Rules: For ADRs/GDRs: underlying security ISIN; convertible bonds: ISIN of conversion instrument; CDS: reference obligation ISIN; index with ISIN: include index ISIN; basket: include all constituent ISINs/indices

Content_to_be_Reported: Indicates whether option is a call or put.
Allowed_Values: CALL (right to buy); PUTO (right to sell); OTHR (holder determines call/put at exercise)
Conditionality_Notes: Applicable to options and swaptions only; not populated for non-option derivatives

Content_to_be_Reported: Predetermined exercise price of the option or swaption. Same price format options as Field 33. Use PNDG where not yet known. Not required if instrument ISIN is provided.
Format_Pattern: Monetary / Percentage / Yield / Basis Points / PNDG (same choice as Field 33)
Allowed_Values: MntryVal (amount + ISO 4217 Ccy + optional Sign); Pctg; Yld; BsisPts; NoPric/Pdg = PNDG only (NOAP not valid for strike price)
Conditionality_Notes: Applicable to options and swaptions; not required where ISIN provided for the instrument via direct Id path
Key_Validation_Rules: Same choice structure as Field 33

Content_to_be_Reported: Currency of strike price where expressed in monetary terms.
Conditionality_Notes: Required when Field 50 strike price expressed in monetary terms
Key_Validation_Rules: ISO 4217 currency code; embedded as attribute on the monetary amount element

Content_to_be_Reported: Indicates how/when the option may be exercised: any time (American); on expiry only (European); average price basis (Asian); discrete pre-set dates (Bermudan). Not required if ISIN provided.
Allowed_Values: AMER (American - exercise any time up to expiry); ASIA (Asian - average underlying price basis); BERM (Bermudan - multiple discrete pre-set dates); EURO (European - expiry date only); OTHR (other style)
Conditionality_Notes: Applicable to options; not required where ISIN provided via direct Id path

Content_to_be_Reported: Indicates whether the derivative transaction is settled physically or in cash.
Allowed_Values: PHYS (Physical delivery of the underlying); OPTL (Optional - determined by third party or at counterparty option); CASH (Cash settlement)
Conditionality_Notes: Required for derivative instruments described in the Othr block; not applicable to plain ISIN-identified instruments

Content_to_be_Reported: For multi-currency or cross-currency swaps and swaptions where the underlying is multi-currency: the currency of Leg 2. Mutually exclusive with Field 55.
Conditionality_Notes: Required for multi-currency interest rate derivatives; use the Intrst element under AsstClssSpcfcAttrbts; mutually exclusive with Field 55
Key_Validation_Rules: Currency 1 populated in Field 44; ISO 4217 currency code

Content_to_be_Reported: For FX derivative contracts: the second currency of the pair. Mutually exclusive with Field 54.
Conditionality_Notes: Required for FX derivative contracts; use the FX element under AsstClssSpcfcAttrbts; mutually exclusive with Field 54
Key_Validation_Rules: Currency 1 populated in Field 44; ISO 4217 currency code

Content_to_be_Reported: Person or algorithm within the reporting party responsible for the investment decision. Use national ID for natural persons; algorithm code for automated decision-making systems.
Allowed_Values: NATIONAL_ID: ESMA personal identification pattern (NIDN/CCPT/CONCAT); Algorithm: [A-Z0-9]{1,50}
Conditionality_Notes: Optional; populate where a specific identified person or named algorithm within the firm was responsible
Key_Validation_Rules: For person: CtryOfBrnch [A-Z]{2} + Othr/Id (ESMA NIDN/CCPT/CONCAT pattern) + SchmeNm (NIDN/CCPT or proprietary CONCAT); For algorithm: alphanumeric max 50 chars capital letters/numbers

Field_Name: Country of Branch – Investment Decision Person
Content_to_be_Reported: Country of branch where the person responsible for the investment decision is located.
Conditionality_Notes: Required when Field 56 identifies a natural person; not applicable when Field 56 is an algorithm ID
Key_Validation_Rules: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2

Content_to_be_Reported: Person or algorithm within the reporting party responsible for executing the transaction. Use NORE where the client executed the transaction directly without investment firm execution involvement.
Allowed_Values: NATIONAL_ID (NIDN/CCPT/CONCAT); Algorithm: [A-Z0-9]{1,50}; NORE (client executed directly)
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory for all new reports; exactly one of Person / Algorithm / Client-Direct (NORE) must be selected
Key_Validation_Rules: For person: CtryOfBrnch + personal ID + scheme name; Algorithm: max 50 capital alphanumeric; NORE: client executed directly with no investment firm execution

Content_to_be_Reported: Country of branch where the executing person is located.
Conditionality_Notes: Required when Field 58 identifies a natural person; not applicable for algorithm or NORE
Key_Validation_Rules: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2

Content_to_be_Reported: Pre-trade transparency waiver(s) applied to the transaction. Repeatable - include one entry for each applicable waiver type.
Conditionality_Notes: Applicable where pre-trade transparency waiver was used; element may be repeated for multiple waivers
Key_Validation_Rules: Valid codes published by the FCA; exactly 4 alphanumeric characters per code

Content_to_be_Reported: Indicates a short sell concluded by the investment firm on its own account or on behalf of a client per Article 10 SSR.
Allowed_Values: SESH (Sell Short - requires plus or zero-plus tick); SELL (Standard non-short sell); SSEX (Sell Short Exempt from SSR rules); UNDI (Side undisclosed)
Conditionality_Notes: Applicable where transaction is a short sell; not populated for standard buy or non-short-sell transactions

Content_to_be_Reported: Post-trade transparency indicator per Articles 20(3)(a) and 21(5)(a) UK MiFIR. Repeatable - include one entry per applicable indicator.
Conditionality_Notes: Applicable to OTC transactions subject to post-trade transparency reporting; element may be repeated
Key_Validation_Rules: Valid FCA-published codes; exactly 4 alphanumeric characters

Content_to_be_Reported: Indicates whether the transaction is objectively measurable as reducing risks directly relating to the commercial activity of the executing entity (relevant to non-financial counterparty hedging threshold assessment).
Allowed_Values: true (objectively reduces commercial activity risk); false (does not reduce commercial activity risk)
Conditionality_Notes: Optional; primarily relevant to non-financial counterparties assessing EMIR hedging thresholds

Content_to_be_Reported: Indicates whether the transaction falls within the scope of activity to be reported under the UK Securities Financing Transactions Regulation (UK SFTR).
Allowed_Values: true (within UK SFTR scope); false (not within UK SFTR scope)
Conditionality_Notes: Mandatory for ALL new transaction reports - the only field in the AddtlAttrbts block that is always required
Key_Validation_Rules: Must always be populated; true where transaction is a repo/securities lending/margin lending/buy-sell-back within scope of UK SFTR

Content_to_be_Reported: The 65th field of RTS 22 Annex I could not be definitively determined from the attached XSD and partial FCA validation CSV alone. Based on some RTS 22 implementations this may relate to a reporting obligation or additional venue/instrument attribute. Refer to the complete FCA validation rules CSV and the current FCA Transaction Reporting User Pack (TRUP) for the authoritative definition of field 65.
Key_Error_Codes: IMPORTANT: Verify Field 65 definition against the complete FCA validation rules CSV and current FCA TRUP before production implementation.
